headline: Trump Drops UFO BOMB 💣🛸 Pentagon SPILLS Alien TEA ☕👽
text:
PENTAGON 🏛️💥 just UNLEASHED a THICC STACK 📚🚀 of DECLASSIFIED UFO 👽🛸 DOCS at TRUMP'S 🍊👑 COMMAND – transcripts 📜🎤, vids 📹🔥, audio droppin' like ALIEN BEATS 🎶🪐! Spanning DECADES ⏳😵 from MOON MEN 🚀🌕 to Earth simps 👽 spotting HOVERING ORBS 🌀🍑 and FLASHING LIGHTS 💡⚡ – cuz public OBSESSED AF 🤯👀 with ET BAGGING 👽🍆 since OBAMA'S 'ALIENS REAL BUT I AIN'T SEEN 'EM' TEA ☕😏!

TRUMP 🍊🦅 said 'TREMENDOUS INTEREST' so PENTAGON OBAMAS the FILES 💨📁 – 161 JUICY ONES online 🌐🔓 with MORE CUMMING 💦🛸! Apollo 11 BUZZ ALDRIN 🐝🚀 SPILLS: 'BRIGHT LIGHT LASER VIBES 🔦👀 on MOON TRIP!' Apollo 12 ALAN BEAN 🌕💨 sees PARTICLES SAILING OFF MOON 🐸✨ like ESCAPING PRISON BREAK 🍑🔓! Apollo 17 DUDES 🎉 say 'FOURTH OF JULY FIREWORKS 💥🇺🇸 out there!' – maybe ICE REFLECTIONS ❄️😜 but SUS AF 🕵️‍♂️👽!

Gemini 7 FRANK BORMAN 📡🚀 radios NASA: 'BOGEY + TRILLIONS OF LIL PARTICLES 🧚‍♂️💨 LEFT OF SHIP!' 1957 FBI CHAD 👨‍💼 reports CIRCULAR BEAST 🚀🌪️ risin' from DIRT 🌍 – 2023 Karens 👩‍🍼 see METAL HOVERS 🛸🌀 poppin' from BRIGHT LIGHT PORTALS ✨🚪! Middle East MIL VIDS 📹🇮🇶🇸🇾 from 2022: OVAL MISSILE-STREAKER 🏹🔥 in Iraq/Syria/UAE – PENTAGON calls it 'UNRESOLVED UAP' 🤷‍♂️🛸 STILL NO CIGAR 🚫👽!

CONGRESS SIMPS PUMPED 🤩📈: TIM BURCHETT 🐔🇺🇸 hollers 'GREAT START' on X 🐦💥, ANNA PAULINA LUNA 🌙🔥 dubs it 'MASSIVE STEP' 👣🚀! But MTG MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE 🍑💢 – ex-TRUMP BAE turned QUITTER 😩🚪 – RAGES: 'SHINY OBJECT PROPAGANDA 🛸🤡 distracts from INFLATION HELL 💸😡 and IRAN WAR VIBES 🇮🇷💣!' Girl, stay MAD 🥵😂 – while WE'RE OUT HERE CHASING ALIEN DADDIES 👽🍆 MOON-HOPPING 🌕🦘!

OBAMA BARRY 👴🏾😎 clarified: 'STATS say LIFE OUT THERE 🌌 but NO EVIDENCE in Oval 😤' – Trump like 'HOLD MY BIGMAC 🍔🛸' and DROPS THE FILES! Congress UFO HEARINGS 2022 🔥👽 first in 50 YRS, MIL PROMISES TRANSPARENCY 🫥🔭 – is it DRONES 🤖? LASERS 🔦? Or ET PHONING HOME 📞👽? WALL STREET CUCKS 📉😰 sweatin' but WE'RE LIT AF 🔥🛸 waitin' for BLACKWELL ALIEN INVASION ⚫️👽 or just SPACE JUNK 🚀🗑️? Disclosure ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ incoming – BUCKLE UP BUTTERCUP 🛋️🚀‼️
